issue_title: No State to Show - Augury doesn't track state
issue_body_preview:
Augury: 1.23.0
Date: Tue, 02 Jul 2019 18:15:54 GMT
OS: Win32

Description of issue:
When attempting to run an angular app locally using ng serve from the base cli project startup, state is not showing in the panel for any selected components. If I close and reopen dev-tools I receive  an error
test_description_zh: 在本地使用 ng serve 启动 Angular 应用后，打开 Chrome DevTools 中的 Augury 面板，选择组件树中的任意组件，观察右侧 State 面板是否正常显示该组件的状态信息。尝试关闭并重新打开 DevTools，再次查看 Augury 面板是否能正常加载且无报错。
expected_result_zh: 选择任意组件后，Augury 的 State 面板应正确显示该组件的状态属性和对应值；关闭并重新打开 DevTools 后，Augury 面板应正常加载，不出现错误提示，组件状态信息能够正常追踪和展示。
